ucs.title: [LLM] Storm-0501 Entra ID federated-domain backdoor via AADInternals (any-claim SAML forgery)
ucs.description: Hunts the signature Storm-0501 hybrid-cloud pivot where, after compromising an on-prem privileged identity, the actor uses AADInternals (ConvertTo-AADIntBackdoor / Set-AADIntDomainAuthentication) to add or convert a federated domain in Entra ID and replace federation issuer/signing settings — giving them the ability to forge SAML tokens for ANY user in the tenant prior to deploying Embargo/LockBit ransomware.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true allow_old_summaries=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Change.All_Changes where All_Changes.action=modified AND (All_Changes.object_category IN ("domain","tenant","federation") OR All_Changes.command IN ("Set domain authentication.","Set federation settings on domain.","Add unverified domain.","Verify domain.","Set DirSyncEnabled flag.")) by _time All_Changes.user All_Changes.src All_Changes.object All_Changes.command All_Changes.user_agent | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Changes)` | eval is_aadinternals=if(match(user_agent,"(?i)AADInternals|python-requests|MSOnline"),1,0) | join type=left user [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success AND Authentication.app IN ("Microsoft Graph","Azure Active Directory PowerShell","Microsoft Azure PowerShell") by Authentication.user Authentication.src Authentication.app | `drop_dm_object_name(Authentication)` | stats values(app) as auth_app values(src) as auth_src by user] | where command IN ("Set domain authentication.","Set federation settings on domain.") OR is_aadinternals=1 | `convert_to_str(firstTime)` | `convert_to_str(lastTime)` | table firstTime lastTime user src command object user_agent is_aadinternals auth_app auth_src
ucs.kql:
let fedOps = dynamic(["Set domain authentication.","Set federation settings on domain.","Add unverified domain.","Verify domain.","Set DirSyncEnabled flag.","Update domain."]);
let susAgents = dynamic(["AADInternals","python-requests","MSOnline","AzureADPreview"]);
CloudAppEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where Application in ("Office 365","Microsoft Entra ID","Azure Active Directory")
| where ActionType in (fedOps)
| extend Raw = parse_json(RawEventData)
| extend ModifiedProps = Raw.ModifiedProperties, ExtProps = Raw.ExtendedProperties
| extend TargetDomain = tostring(Raw.ObjectId)
| extend NewIssuer = tostring(parse_json(tostring(ModifiedProps))[0].NewValue)
| extend OldIssuer = tostring(parse_json(tostring(ModifiedProps))[0].OldValue)
| extend UA = tostring(Raw.ExtendedProperties[0].Value)
| extend AADInternalsLike = iff(UA has_any(susAgents) or NewIssuer has "any.sts" or NewIssuer has "AADInternals",1,0)
| join kind=leftouter (
    AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where Application in ("Microsoft Graph PowerShell","Azure Active Directory PowerShell","Microsoft Azure PowerShell")
    | summarize SigninApps=make_set(Application), SigninIPs=make_set(IPAddress), SigninCountry=make_set(Country) by AccountObjectId
) on $left.AccountObjectId == $right.AccountObjectId
| project Timestamp, AccountDisplayName, AccountUpn, AccountObjectId, ActionType, TargetDomain, OldIssuer, NewIssuer, IPAddress, UA, AADInternalsLike, SigninApps, SigninIPs, SigninCountry
| order by AADInternalsLike desc, Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: Microsoft Threat Intelligence's Sept-2024 Storm-0501 writeup specifically calls out the actor's use of AADInternals to add a federated domain and modify federation settings as the on-prem→cloud pivot before encryption. Federation auth changes are extremely rare (<1/quarter in normal tenants) and almost never originate from PowerShell user agents — making domain-auth modification + AADInternals UA

ucs.title: [LLM] Storm-0501 hybrid pivot: DCSync from Entra Connect / sync-account host followed by cloud Global Admin role grant
ucs.description: Detects Storm-0501's documented 'on-prem to Entra' chain — credential dumping (Impacket secretsdump / Mimikatz DCSync) executed from or against the Entra Connect (AAD Connect Sync) server using the directory-sync service account, immediately followed by abuse of those credentials in Entra to add Global Administrator / Privileged Role Admin to a new identity prior to ransomware staging.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true allow_old_summaries=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("python.exe","python3.exe","impacket-secretsdump.exe") AND Processes.process="*secretsdump*") OR (Processes.process IN ("*lsadump::dcsync*","*Invoke-DCSync*","*-just-dc-ntlm*","*/user:krbtgt*")) OR (Processes.process_name="ntdsutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*ifm*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name _time | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as sync_host | join type=inner sync_host [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.signature_id="4662" AND (Authentication.app="*Replicating Directory Changes*" OR Authentication.object="*1131f6aa-9c07-11d1-f79f-00c04fc2dcd2*") AND Authentication.user IN ("*MSOL_*","*AAD_*","*ADSync*") by Authentication.src Authentication.user Authentication.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Authentication)` | rename src as sync_host] | join type=inner user [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Change.All_Changes where All_Changes.action=created AND (All_Changes.command IN ("Add member to role.","Add eligible member to role.") AND All_Changes.object IN ("Global Administrator","Privileged Role Administrator","Application Administrator")) by All_Changes.user All_Changes.object All_Changes.src | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Changes)` | rename object as RoleGranted, src as cloud_src] | stats values(process) as dcsync_proc values(sync_host) as src_host values(RoleGranted) as cloud_role_granted values(cloud_src) as cloud_ip min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by user | `convert_to_str(firstTime)` | `convert_to_str(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let dcsyncWindow = 6h;
let credDump = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
  | where (FileName in~ ("python.exe","python3.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has "secretsdump")
        or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("lsadump::dcsync","Invoke-DCSync","-just-dc-ntlm","/user:krbtgt","DRSUAPI")
        or (FileName =~ "ntdsutil.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "ifm")
  | project DumpTime=Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName=InitiatingProcessAccountName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName;
let replication = IdentityDirectoryEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
  | where ActionType == "Directory Services replication"
  | where AccountName has_any ("MSOL_","AAD_","ADSync","Sync_") or DestinationDeviceName has_any ("AADC","AZUREAD","ENTRA","SYNC")
  | project ReplTime=Timestamp, AccountName, AccountUpn, DestinationDeviceName, IPAddress;
let cloudRole = CloudAppEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
  | where ActionType in ("Add member to role.","Add eligible member to role.","Add app role assignment to service principal.")
  | extend Raw = parse_json(RawEventData)
  | extend RoleName = tostring(Raw.ModifiedProperties[1].NewValue)
  | where RoleName has_any ("Global Administrator","Privileged Role Administrator","Application Administrator","Cloud Application Administrator")
  | project RoleTime=Timestamp, ActorUpn=AccountDisplayName, ActorObjectId=AccountObjectId, RoleName, IPAddress, UserAgent;
credDump
| join kind=inner (replication) on $left.AccountName == $right.AccountName
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', ReplTime, DumpTime)) <= 360
| join kind=inner (cloudRole) on $left.AccountName == $right.ActorUpn
| where (RoleTime - DumpTime) between (0min .. dcsyncWindow)
| project DumpTime, ReplTime, RoleTime, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine, DestinationDeviceName, RoleName, IPAddress1=IPAddress, RoleIP=IPAddress1, UserAgent
| order by DumpTime desc
ucs.rationale: Storm-0501's Microsoft-published playbook is uniquely 'AD → DCSync via the Entra Connect/MSOL_ sync account → reuse credentials in Entra → add a fresh Global Admin → exfil + ransomware' — chaining on-prem credential theft with a same-actor cloud privilege escalation in a tight window. Generic ransomware affiliates (e.g. straight LockBit/Akira deployments) typically stop at on-prem DCSync and do NO
